debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
h : e.eval ≠ Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args
⊢ (if Exp.eval (Clap.bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - e.eval = 0 then Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ cs else denotation.n) =
    denotation.n

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : (bits2num_e (ZMod p) w args).eval - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    have h₂ : (bits2num_e (ZMod p) w args).eval = bits2num p inst✝ w args := by
      have h₃ : ∀ {w : ℕ} {F : Type} [Field F] [DecidableEq F] (args : Vector F w),
        (bits2num_e F w args).eval = bits2num F args := by
        intro w F _ _ args
        induction' w with w ih
        · simp [bits2num_e, bits2num]
        · simp [bits2num_e, bits2num, Vector.foldl, Exp.eval, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, add_assoc]
          <;>
          simp_all [add_mul, add_assoc]
          <;>
          ring_nf at *
          <;>
          simp_all
          <;>
          aesop
      exact h₃ args
    have h₄ : e.eval ≠ bits2num p inst✝ w args := h
    rw [h₂] at *
    intro h₅
    apply h₄
    simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
    <;>
    aesop
  split_ifs <;>
  (try { contradiction }) <;>
  (try { simp_all }) <;>
  (try { aesop }) <;>
  (try { simp_all [h₁] }) <;>
  (try { aesop })

simp [bits2num_e, exp_eval]

  have h₂ : (Exp.eval (bits2num_e args - e) : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₃
    have h₄ : (Exp.eval (bits2num_e args - e) : ZMod p) = 0 := by simpa using h₃
    have h₅ : (Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) : ZMod p) - (Exp.eval e : ZMod p) = 0 := by
      simpa [Exp.eval_sub] using h₄
    have h₆ : (Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) : ZMod p) = (Exp.eval e : ZMod p) := by
      rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₅
      exact h₅
    have h₇ : (bits2num args : ZMod p) = (Exp.eval e : ZMod p) := by
      rw [h₁] at h₆
      exact h₆
    have h₈ : e.eval = bits2num args := by
      simp_all [exp_eval]

      <;> ring_nf at *
      <;> simp_all [ZMod.le_char]

  ring_nf at *
  <;>

  have h₂ : (bits2num_e args - e).eval ≠ 0 := by
    have h₃ : (bits2num_e args - e).eval = (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval := by
      simp [Exp.eval_sub]
    rw [h₃]
    have h₄ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := h₁
    rw [h₄]
    intro h₅
    apply h
    have h₆ : bits2num args - e.eval = 0 := h₅
    have h₇ : bits2num args = e.eval := by
      -- Since the difference is zero, the two elements must be equal.
      apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero
      simpa using h₆
    -- The assumption h says that e.eval ≠ bits2num args, which contradicts h₇.
    rw [h₇] at *
    <;> simp_all

    · -- Case: (bits2num_e args - e).eval = 0
      exfalso

    · -- Case: (bits2num_e args - e).eval ≠ 0

    have h₄ : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval = 0 := by

      <;> simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
      <;> try ring_nf at *
      <;> try simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
      <;> try norm_num at *
      <;> try aesop
    have h₅ : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by
      rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₄

    exact h₁ (by simp_all [sub_eq_zero])

    split_ifs with h₄
    · exfalso
      apply h₂
      exact h₄
    · rfl

    simp [Cs.eval, h₃]
    <;>

    (try ring_nf at *) <;>
    (try simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
    (try norm_num at *) <;>
    (try aesop)

have h₁ : (bits2num_e args).eval = (bits2num args) := by
    simp [bits2num_e, bits2num]
    <;> rfl
  have h₂ : (bits2num_e args - e).eval ≠ 0 := by
    rw [h₁]
    intro h₃
    apply h
    have h₄ : (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)).eval = (bits2num args : ZMod p) := by
      rw [h₃]
      simp [sub_self]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp_all [sub_eq_add_neg]
      <;> norm_num
      <;> rfl
    simpa using h₄
  simp [h₂]
  <;> aesop

intro h₂
    have h₃ : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) - Exp.eval e = 0 := by
      simpa [exp_sub] using h₂
    have h₄ : (bits2num_e args).eval = (bits2num args : ZMod p) := by
      have h₅ : (bits2num_e args).eval = (bits2num args : ZMod p) := by
        -- Prove that the evaluation of bits2num_e matches bits2num
        simp [bits2num_e, bits2num, Vector.foldl]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try
          {
            induction w with
            | zero =>
              simp_all
            | succ w ih =>
              simp_all [Vector.foldl, ZMod.nat_cast_self]
              <;> simp_all [mul_add, mul_one, add_mul]
              <;> ring_nf at *
              <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
          }
        ) <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [Vector.foldl, ZMod.nat_cast_self]
            <;> simp_all [mul_add, mul_one, add_mul]
            <;> ring_nf at *
            <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
          }
        )
      exact h₅
    have h₅ : (bits2num args : ZMod p) - Exp.eval e = 0 := by
      simpa [h₄] using h₃
    have h₆ : (bits2num args : ZMod p) = Exp.eval e := by
      have h₇ : (bits2num args : ZMod p) - Exp.eval e = 0 := h₅
      have h₈ : (bits2num args : ZMod p) = Exp.eval e := by
        rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₇
        exact h₇
      exact h₈
    have h₇ : e.eval = (bits2num args : ZMod p) := by
      rw [h₆] at *
      <;> simp_all [exp_isomorphism]
    exact h h₇
  simp [Cs.eval, h₁]
  <;> simp_all [denotation]
  <;> try aesop

exact h₅.elim
· simp_all [denotation.n]

have h₁ : (bits2num_e args : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)) .eval = bits2num args := by
    simp [bits2num_e, bits2num, Vector.foldl]
    <;>
    (try cases w <;> simp_all [Vector.foldl, Vector.get])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
    <;>
    (try norm_num at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
    <;>
    (try omega)
  have h₂ : (bits2num_e args - e) .eval = bits2num args - e.eval := by
    simp [h₁]
    <;>
    (try cases w <;> simp_all [Vector.foldl, Vector.get])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
    <;>
    (try norm_num at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
    <;>
    (try omega)
  simp [h₂]
  <;>
  (try cases w <;> simp_all [Vector.foldl, Vector.get])
  <;>
  (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
  <;>
  (try norm_num at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
  <;>
  (try omega)
  <;>
  (try simp_all [sub_eq_zero])
  <;>
  (try
    {
      intro h₃
      apply h
      simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
      <;>
      (try norm_num at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
      <;>
      (try omega)
    })

intro h₂
    have h₃ : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by
      rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₂
      exact h₂
    have h₄ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      have h₅ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
        simp [bits2num_e, bits2num, Vector.foldl]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try {
          revert args
          intro args
          induction args <;> simp_all [Vector.foldl]
          <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
          (try simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
          (try simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
        }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [exp_eval, bits2num_e, bits2num, Vector.foldl]
          <;>
          (try ring_nf at *) <;>
          (try simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try decide)
        })
      exact h₅
    have h₅ : e.eval = bits2num args := by
      linarith
    exact h h₅
  simp [h₁]
  <;>
  simp_all [h₁]
  <;>
  (try decide)
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [denotation]
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [h₁]
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [denotation]
  })

unfold bits2num_e
    simp [Vector.foldl]
    <;> induction args <;> simp_all [Vector.cons_val_zero, Vector.cons_val_succ, pow_succ]
    <;> ring_nf at * <;> norm_num <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
    <;> try omega
  have h₂ : (bits2num_e args - e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)).eval ≠ 0 := by
    simp [h₁]
    intro h₃
    apply h
    have h₄ : (bits2num_e args : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)).eval = bits2num args := h₁
    simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
  simp [h₂]

have h₂ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    simp [bits2num_e, bits2num, exp_num]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try
      rcases args with ⟨⟩ <;>
      simp_all [Vector.foldl, ZMod.val_zero, Nat.cast_zero, add_zero]
    ) <;>
    (try
      rcases args with ⟨first, rest⟩ <;>
      simp_all [Vector.foldl, ZMod.val_zero, Nat.cast_zero, add_zero, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
    )
  have h₃ : (bits2num_e args - e).eval = bits2num args - e.eval := by
    simp [exp_sub, h₂]
  have h₄ : bits2num args - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₄
    apply h
    have h₅ : e.eval = bits2num args := by
      have h₅₁ : bits2num args - e.eval = 0 := h₄
      have h₅₂ : bits2num args = e.eval := by
        rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₅₁
        exact h₅₁
      rw [h₅₂]
    exact h₅
  simp [h₃, h₄]
  <;>
  (try
    {
      aesop
    }
  ) <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [exp_num]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try
        rcases args with ⟨⟩ <;>
        simp_all [Vector.foldl, ZMod.val_zero, Nat.cast_zero, add_zero]
      ) <;>
      (try
        rcases args with ⟨first, rest⟩ <;>
        simp_all [Vector.foldl, ZMod.val_zero, Nat.cast_zero, add_zero, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
      )
    }
  )

<;>
  (try
    simp_all [bits2num_e, bits2num, Subtype.ext_iff]
    <;>
    ring_nf at *
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [bits2num_e, bits2num, Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      aesop
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {

      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      aesop
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [bits2num_e, bits2num, Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      aesop
    })
<;> ring_nf at * <;> simp_all

<;>
  aesop

<;>
    rfl
  have h₂ : (bits2num_e args - e).eval = bits2num args - e.eval := by
    simp [h₁, Exp.eval_sub]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    rfl
  have h₃ : bits2num args - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₄
    have h₅ : bits2num args = e.eval := by
      rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₄
      exact h₄
    apply h
    rw [h₅]
  have h₄ : (bits2num_e args - e).eval ≠ 0 := by
    rw [h₂]
    exact h₃
  simp [cs, Cs.eval, h₄]
  <;>
  aesop

simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
  <;>
  simp_all [bits2num_e, bits2num, Vector.foldl]
  <;>
  try contradiction
  <;>
  try simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
  <;>
  try ring_nf at *
  <;>
  try norm_num at *
  <;>
  try contradiction
  <;>
  try simp_all
  <;>
  try omega

<;>
        (try simp_all [ZMod.natCast_self, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try simp_all [ZMod.natCast_self, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [ZMod.natCast_self, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [ZMod.natCast_self, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [ZMod.natCast_self, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [ZMod.natCast_self, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try norm_num)
      exact h₄
    have h₄ : e.eval = bits2num args := by
      linarith
    have h₅ : e.eval = bits2num args := h₄
    have h₆ : e.eval ≠ bits2num args := h
    contradiction
  simp_all [if_neg]
  <;> aesop

have h₁ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    subst_vars
    rfl
  simp [h₁]
  <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try simp_all [sub_eq_zero]) <;>
  (try norm_num at h ⊢) <;>
  (try aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      have h₂ := h
      simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
      <;>
      (try contradiction)
      <;>
      (try norm_num at h ⊢)
      <;>
      (try aesop)
    })
